Built for Civic Action

Stop Ignoring Issues.
Start Creating Change.

Everything citizens need to report, verify and track neighbourhood issues in one transparent platform. Built specifically for Bengaluru's 10 million residents.

Powerful Features

Track Every Report Instantly.

From submission to resolution — every step is visible, transparent and accountable.

Report

Report Issues in Under 60 Seconds

Point, shoot and submit. Spottix automatically attaches your GPS coordinates, timestamp and ward assignment.

Photo ProofAttach up to 3 photos as evidence
Accurate GPSAuto-tagged to exact ward and street
Issue CategoriesGarbage, sewage, roads, lights and more
Track

Know Exactly What Happens Next

Every status change triggers a push notification so you always know how your report is progressing.

Push NotificationsReal-time status updates
4-Step TimelineNew → Verified → In Progress → Resolved
Report HistoryAll your submissions in one place
Map

Explore Every Issue Around You

See all active reports on an interactive map of Bengaluru's wards. Filter by type, status and distance.

Ward MapAll 50+ Bengaluru wards with data
Smart FiltersBy category, status and date range
Nearby ReportsIssues within your walking distance
Ranks

Compete for a Cleaner Bengaluru

Earn points for every verified report. Rise through the ranks and represent your ward on the leaderboard.

Civic Badges4 tiers from Rookie to Legend
LeaderboardsBy citizen, ward and monthly period
Account

Your Civic Impact at a Glance

See all your reports, badges, points and ward contribution stats from your personal account dashboard.

Personal ProfileYour reports and impact score
Activity HistoryEvery report you have ever submitted
Smart Reporting

Report Issues With Complete Clarity

Submit a fully detailed civic report in under 60 seconds with a photo, GPS location and category — routed directly to the right ward officer.

Photo upload with auto-compression
Accurate GPS location tagging
Issue category selection
Automatic ward officer assignment
Live Tracking

Know Exactly What Happens Next

Never wonder what happened to your report again. Follow every step of the process with real-time notifications and a visual progress timeline.

Report submitted confirmation
Ward officer inspection update
Team dispatched notification
Issue resolved with before/after photo
Seamless Discovery

Explore Every Issue Around You

Browse all reported civic issues across Bengaluru's wards on an interactive map. Filter by type, status or distance from you.

Interactive Bengaluru ward map
Nearby reports within walking distance
Smart filters by category and status
Resolution heatmap by ward
How It Works

The Roadmap to a Cleaner City.

Four simple steps that turn your phone into a powerful civic action tool.

01
👁️
Spot
Notice a civic problem? Open Spottix and you are already half done.
  • Garbage pile on the street
  • Sewage overflow on the footpath
  • Broken street light at night
  • Pothole on the main road
02
📸
Report
Snap a photo, choose a category and submit. Takes less than 60 seconds.
  • Click a clear photo of the issue
  • GPS is attached automatically
  • Select the issue category
  • Tap submit — done
03
🔔
Track
Get notified at every stage as the ward officer takes action on your report.
  • Report assigned to ward officer
  • Inspection confirmed notification
  • Cleanup team dispatched
  • Estimated resolution time shown
04
✅
Resolve
See the before and after — your neighbourhood visibly improved thanks to you.
  • Resolved notification with photo
  • Civic points credited to account
  • Badge progress updated
  • Ward stats improve
Real Impact

See the Transformation.

Real before-and-after results from Spottix users across Bengaluru neighbourhoods.

BEFORE AFTER

🗑 Before

  • Uncleared garbage for 3 days
  • Health hazard for residents
  • No response from authorities

✅ After Spottix

  • Reported via Spottix app
  • Cleared within 18 hours
  • Citizen earned 50 points

Testimonials

Loved by Citizens.
Trusted Across Bengaluru.

Real stories from people who used Spottix to make their neighbourhood cleaner.

★★★★★

"The garbage at the corner of our street had not been collected for a week. I reported it on Spottix and by the next afternoon it was gone. I did not expect it to work so fast!"

A
Ananya Krishnan
Resident · Koramangala
★★★★★

"I love the tracking feature. You can see step by step who is handling your report and when they inspected the spot. Finally some transparency from the system!"

M
Mohammed Farhan
Small Business Owner · Indiranagar
★★★★★

"Our RWA group uses Spottix collectively now. We report issues together and the ward resolution rate has gone from 60% to over 90% in just three months."

S
Sumathi Iyer
RWA President · Jayanagar
★★★★★

"The pothole on our road had been there for months. One report on Spottix and it was patched within four days. My ward officer even messaged me through the app!"

D
Divya Reddy
Software Engineer · HSR Layout
★★★★★

"My kids love helping me spot issues on our evening walk. We have submitted 40 reports together and earned the Ward Champion badge for Whitefield!"

N
Nandini Patel
Mother of Two · Whitefield
★★★★★

"A broken street light near the school was a real safety issue. Spottix connected it to the right department instantly and it was fixed before the weekend."

K
Karthik Rao
Teacher · Malleshwaram
A
P
R
S
D
+
Trusted by 10,000+ Citizens

Across 50+ Bengaluru wards, everyday residents are using Spottix to make their neighbourhoods cleaner, safer and more liveable — one report at a time.

FAQ

Common Questions.

Everything you need to know before getting started with Spottix.

Yes, Spottix is completely free for all citizens. There are no subscription fees, no hidden charges and no premium tiers. Download the app, create a free account and start reporting.
Yes. You can enable anonymous reporting in your account settings. Anonymous reports are still fully processed and forwarded to ward officers. However, to earn points and badges you need a named account.
Spottix currently operates across all 50+ wards of Bengaluru. We are actively working to expand to Mysuru, Mangaluru and other Karnataka cities in 2026. Sign up to be notified when your city goes live.
GPS location is used only to tag your report to the correct ward and assign it to the right officer. We never sell or share your location data with third parties. You can read our full Privacy Policy at the bottom of this page.
Resolution time depends on the issue type and the ward officer. Most garbage and sewage reports are resolved within 24–72 hours. Road and infrastructure repairs may take 7–14 days. You can track the exact status at any time inside the app.
Other citizens can upvote your report if they see the same issue. Reports with more upvotes get prioritised in the system and are assigned to officers faster. Verified upvotes also earn you bonus points.
Yes. The Live Map section shows all active and resolved reports across your ward. You can filter by category, status and date. Ward-level statistics including open issues, resolution rate and top reporters are visible to everyone.
Spottix is currently available on Android via the Google Play Store. An iOS version is in active development and is expected to launch in late 2026. You can join the waitlist from this page to be notified the moment it launches.
